# Faith Driven Singapore

> Faith Driven Singapore is the local Singapore chapter of the global Faith Driven Entrepreneur movement — a growing community of Christ-following founders and business builders who gather monthly, online and in person, to worship, learn, and grow together. No cost. No catch.

Faith Driven Singapore helps Christ-following entrepreneurs in Singapore find community and fulfil their God-given call to create. The chapter runs monthly gatherings across Singapore (past venues include Browzwear, City Harvest, Endowus, Nautique and Block71), hosts 8-week Foundations Groups based on the Faith Driven Entrepreneur Foundation Course, and points members to the free Faith Driven Entrepreneur book, video series and weekly podcast. The website is available in four languages: English, Chinese (中文), Malay (Bahasa Melayu) and Tamil (தமிழ்).

## Key facts

- Name: Faith Driven Singapore (local chapter of Faith Driven Entrepreneur)
- Location: Singapore
- Cost: Free — "No cost. No catch."
- Cadence: Monthly gatherings, online and in person
- Audience: Christ-following entrepreneurs, founders and business builders, whether just starting out or scaling up
- Languages: English, 中文, Bahasa Melayu, தமிழ்
- Contact: WhatsApp +65 9122 7009
- Website: https://faithdriven.sg

## Get involved

- [Get in touch on WhatsApp](https://wa.me/6591227009): Message the team to find your next step.
- [WhatsApp community group](https://chat.whatsapp.com/EJtCAix4JwJDM1nmpd4XhM): Prayer, encouragement and updates between sessions.
- [Register with Faith Driven Entrepreneur](https://share.somin.ai/fde): Join the global movement and get connected to a group.
- [Next gathering (Eventbrite)](https://share.somin.ai/event-fde): Register for the next monthly gathering in Singapore.

## Resources

- [The Faith Driven Entrepreneur book (free)](https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/books/): Free book plus video series, discussion guide and community access.
- [The Foundation Course](https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/foundation-course/): The flagship 8-session video series featuring J.D. Greear and Henry Kaestner.
- [The Podcast](https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/podcast/): Weekly conversations for the faithful disruptors called to create.
- [Watch gatherings on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy0L7vhcU5iSuap8kEmpHlA): Recorded founder stories and sessions from Singapore gatherings.

## Support

- [Become a monthly partner](https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/donate/): Monthly giving from S$10 funds the food, venue and essentials to host gatherings. One-time gifts and local bank transfers are welcome via WhatsApp.

## About the movement

- [Faith Driven Entrepreneur (global)](https://faithdrivenentrepreneur.org/): The global movement helping Christ-following entrepreneurs find their community and fulfil their God-given call to create.
